scripts.build: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run deploy:build
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed && node dist/index.js
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma db push --force-reset --accept-data-loss && npx prisma db seed
